svg.title: S1-Scout Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end data mining pipeline for S1-Scout, showing 8 stages with agent names, tools, and data flow.
svg.text: AI Sales Intelligence Agent · Indian Automotive Market
pdfplumber → chunk → embed → ChromaDB index · API config & credential validation
Agent: Web Scraper · BeautifulSoup scrape → deduplicate → filter active → 75-company universe
Agent: Market Research Analyst · IBEF PDFs + Serper + SIAM data → GPT-4o market synthesis
Agent: Company Intelligence Analyst · Serper per-company → 6-dimension profile × 75 companies
Agent: S1-Scout Sentinel · 6-dim weighted score → cap-tier modifier → Top 15 selection (private floor)
Agent: Solution Mapping Consultant · handbook_search RAG → pain-to-solution routing → handbook citations
matplotlib · Scorecard bar chart · Opportunity matrix · Service breakdown — saved as .png
Pure assembly · all JSON + charts → consultant-grade markdown report (15 company profiles + targeting plan)
